name: Autoresearch Task
description: Optimize the document indexing pipeline by implementing better text preprocessing: add stopword removal, implement phrase detection for multi-word queries, and improve the document scoring with length normalization (BM25 b parameter tuning). This directly targets the ndcg and precision metrics visible in smoke-test evaluations.
